pi_items.source: WebFetch to https://books.toscrape.com/ confirms site exists as 'a demo website for web scraping purposes' with 1,000 books
WebSearch and WebFetch confirm book exists at https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/its-only-the-himalayas_981/index.html with correct URL fragment
Path is specified in task.json and referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; this is an expected path configured in task environment
Path is specified in task.json and referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; this is an expected path configured in task environment

WebFetch of https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/its-only-the-himalayas_981/index.html shows breadcrumb: Home > Books > Travel > It's Only the Himalayas. Crawl depth is 3 steps (0-indexed: 2, 1-indexed: 3). Metadata range [1,4] is broader than actual depth but includes correct value.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real educational web scraping demo site. The book 'It's Only the Himalayas' (URL: its-only-the-himalayas_981) exists on the site and is categorized under Travel. The navigation breadcrumb is Home > Books > Travel > Product, making the actual crawl depth 2 (0-indexed) or 3 (1-indexed). The metadata specifies expected output paths in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/ for both a CSV export and depth report text file.
